name: femtum-sdk
documentation:
# Femtum SDK - Dotnet

[![NuGet](https://img.shields.io/nuget/v/Femtum.SDK.svg)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Femtum.SDK)

### Installation

To install the Femtum SDK, use the following command:

##### pip

```bash
pip install femtum-sdk
```

##### poetry

```bash
poetry add femtum-sdk
```
